zh.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner於1564年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩。她於1585年與Christoph Gärtner在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1617年1月23日在她的家鄉享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gaetner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

variants.name: Gaertner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Helmut, Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Irmgard, Karl Heinz, Ulrich.

variants.name: Gardner
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English gardener ‘gardener’, Old French gardinier, jardinier.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gärtner or Gartner and French Desjardins .

variants.name: Gertner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Alter, Chaim, Izidor, Mendel, Meyer, Shimon, Shmuel, Zalman.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Gärtner ‘gardener’ (see Gartner ).

variants.name: Gartmann
meanings: German and Swiss German: occupational name for a gardener (see   Gartner  ); in some cases it may be a status name, referring to the owner of a small (enclosed or fenced) farm, or occupational name for a worker at a deer preserve (see   Garth  ). Compare   Gartman   and   Girtman  .
German: habitational name for someone from Garte near Osnabrück.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner was born in 1564, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. She married Christoph Gärtner in 1585, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 January 1617, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner est née en 1564, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Christoph Gärtner en 1585, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1617, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner wurde 1564 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat 1585 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Christoph Gärtner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1617 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner è nata il nel 1564 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Lei sposato Christoph Gärtner nel 1585, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1617, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサ

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetnerは1564年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた。1585年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでChristoph Gärtnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1617年1月23日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner(은)는 1564년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1585년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Christoph Gärtner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1617년 1월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner nasceu em 1564, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Christoph Gärtner em 1585, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1617, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner родилась в 1564 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christoph Gärtner в 1585 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 января 1617 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Christina Gaetner nació en 1564, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Se casó con Christoph Gärtner en 1585, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1617, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
